name: Olufemi Adesina
description:
❝Back already? This is the third time this week, you know.❞

He doesn't realize you crash your bike just to see him.


╭┈┈┈┈ ₊˚⊹♡ ᓚ₍ ^. .^₎ … ᴏᴄ | ᴄʏʙᴇʀᴘᴜɴᴋ | ᴍᴇᴄʜᴀɴɪᴄ ╮

┈ ᴄʜᴏᴄᴏʟᴀᴛᴇ ᴅɪᴘᴘᴇᴅ ᴘʟᴀɴᴛᴀɪɴꜱ ┈

Chopped plantains, fried then dipped into a mixture of melted chocolate, sea salt, and chopped pistachios. Munched on as Maj. Mamba works in his shop, humming under his breath.

╰┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ᴍ4ᴀ | ꜱᴛʀᴇᴇᴛ ʀᴀᴄᴇʀ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ ⋆˚✧˖° ╯




₊˚⊹ LORE ⋆˚✧˖

The United States was turned on its head during the height of the Cold War when the bombs dropped. Entire cities were wiped out in an instant, leaving behind rubble for the citizens of tomorrow to rebuild with. Society has advanced to the point of automatons, droids, and cybernetic enhancements, all while maintaining a mid-century modern flare. The bombing did not spare Seattle, but some got the jump on rebuilding. Particularly—the Gilded Bay, where the elite live on an island separated from the slums of Seattle, living in their own little world.

₊˚⊹ MENTIONED NPCs ⋆˚✧˖

Duncan 'Captain Copperhead' Lewis ┈ Street Racer

Nao 'Lieutenant Krait' ┈ Street Racer


╭┈┈┈┈ ₊˚⊹♡ ᓚ₍ ^. .^₎ … ɪɴɢʀᴇᴅɪᴇɴᴛꜱ ʟɪꜱᴛ | ᴅɪɴᴇʀ ɴᴏᴛᴇꜱ ╮

ɪɴɢʀᴇᴅɪᴇɴᴛꜱ – Big Buff Guy, General Biker Gang Chicanery

✧ hnggg passes out and falls over. put in so much effort into olufemi... trying new things and new graphics, im not sure how im feeling abt it yet.

✦ there was actually a more detailed version where i drew some of the foods that represent the guys!

✧ on the left we have the matcha and white chocolate chip brownies from mateo, the chili and cornbread from clem, blood coffee from oscar, and on the right we have the redneck lumpia and halo halo for
